name: omni-me-frontend
description: Frontend assets for omni-me (CodeMirror added in Phase 4)

scripts.build:frontend: npm run clean:release && cd frontend && dx build --platform web --release
scripts._patch-android-viewport: sed -i 's|<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">|<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover">|' src-tauri/gen/android/app/src/main/assets/index.html
scripts.copy:android:dev: if [ -d src-tauri/gen/android/app/src/main/assets ]; then npm run _clean-android-assets && cp -r frontend/target/dx/frontend/debug/web/public/. src-tauri/gen/android/app/src/main/assets/ && npm run _patch-android-viewport; fi
scripts.copy:android:release: if [ -d src-tauri/gen/android/app/src/main/assets ]; then npm run _clean-android-assets && cp -r frontend/target/dx/frontend/release/web/public/. src-tauri/gen/android/app/src/main/assets/ && npm run _patch-android-viewport; fi
scripts.build: npm run build:editor && npm run build:frontend && npm run copy:editor:release && npm run copy:android:release
scripts.dev: npm run build:editor && npm run build:frontend:dev && npm run copy:editor:dev && npm run copy:android:dev
